channel.title: Thorpe Family History
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Thorpe Family History

item.title: John McIntyre Lemmon
item.description: John McIntyre Lemmon Biographical Profile Name: John McIntyre Lemmon Role in this project: Lemmon-line son of Uriah Blake Lemmon and Emily Amanda MacIntyre, documented in census summaries and a Sandusky/Ottawa County biographical sketch.

item.title: Book Outprints — Grand Army Records Watson Moses Risden
item.description: Grand Army Records — Watson Moses Risden Source Shared Intake files: /mnt/g/My Drive/Thorpe Shared Intake/Book Outprints/Fairfield County outprint/Risden Watson Moses/Grand Army.pdf /mnt/g/My Drive/Thorpe Shared Intake/Book Outprints/Fairfield County outprint/Risden Watson Moses/Grand Army Risden.pd...

item.title: Book Outprints — Sandusky-Beers Lemmon John M
item.description: Sandusky-Beers — John McIntyre Lemmon Source Publication: Commemorative Biographical Record of the Counties of Sandusky and Ottawa, Ohio Publisher: J.

item.title: Home
item.description: Home This page is the secondary orientation page for the Thorpe family research vault. For the public starting point, begin at Thorpe Family History.

item.title: Hannah Waller
item.description: Hannah Waller Biographical Profile Name: Hannah Waller Role in this project: Individual indexed in Census InDesign summary (2026-04-24 intake).

item.title: John Thorp
item.description: John Thorp Biographical Profile Name: John Thorp Dates: 1791-1850 Role in this project: Thorpe line patriarch; progenitor of William Monroe Thorp line documented in 1835-1899.

item.title: John Whitfield
item.description: John Whitfield Biographical Profile Name: John Whitfield Role in this project: Individual indexed in Census InDesign summary (2026-04-24 intake).

item.title: Mary Whitfield
item.description: Mary Whitfield Biographical Profile Name: Mary Whitfield Role in this project: Individual indexed in Census InDesign summary (2026-04-24 intake).

item.title: William Monroe Thorp
item.description: William Monroe Thorp Biographical Profile Name: William Monroe Thorp Dates: 1835-1899 Role in this project: Bridge generation Thorpe patriarch; son of John Thorp, father of Uriah Blake Thorpe and Ralph Gerald Thorpe.

item.title: American Settlement and Migration Timeline
item.description: American Settlement and Migration Timeline Overview The Thorpe family ancestors documented in this vault show a consistent pattern of Atlantic migration from UK (primarily 1754–1840) to American settlement in the Midwest (1840–1900).
